quote: I will not say the day is done, nor bid the stars farewell.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: The Heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of His hands.
author: Psalm 19:1

quote: Never lose an opportunity of seeing anything beautiful. Beauty is God’s handwriting.
author: Charles Kingsley

quote: I believe in Christianity as I believe that the sun has risen: not only because I see it, but because by it I see everything else.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: In the darkness something was happening at last. A voice had begun to sing.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: If I find in myself desires which nothing in this world can satisfy, the only logical explanation is that I was made for another world.
author: C.S. Lewis
